claims.claimText: Proximal Biceps Tendon Pathology pathoanatomy centers on biceps-anchor, labrum, rotator-cuff and related stabilizers.

metadata.claim_text: Proximal Biceps Tendon Pathology pathoanatomy centers on biceps-anchor, labrum, rotator-cuff and related stabilizers.

claims.claimText: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating proximal biceps tendon pathology.

metadata.claim_text: Students often underweight exam findings and over-rely on imaging when evaluating proximal biceps tendon pathology.

claims.claimText: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for proximal biceps tendon pathology.

metadata.claim_text: State mechanism, key exam findings, imaging role, treatment concept, and return-to-play framework for proximal biceps tendon pathology.

claims.claimText: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for proximal biceps tendon pathology — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

metadata.claim_text: Do not anchor on a single exam maneuver for proximal biceps tendon pathology — integrate mechanism, instability symptoms, and imaging pattern.

claims.claimText: Proximal biceps pathology presents with anterior shoulder pain and Popeye deformity after rupture.

metadata.claim_text: Proximal biceps pathology presents with anterior shoulder pain and Popeye deformity after rupture.

claims.claimText: Distal migration of the biceps muscle belly suggests long head rupture (Popeye sign).

metadata.claim_text: Distal migration of the biceps muscle belly suggests long head rupture (Popeye sign).

claims.claimText: Rehabilitation milestones and return-to-play criteria for proximal biceps tendon pathology require attending-defined progression gates.

decisionPoints.trigger: Active athlete with functional instability or mechanical symptoms from proximal biceps tendon pathology despite appropriate initial management
decisionPoints.action: Discuss operative reconstruction versus continued rehabilitation; graft selection and fixation are attending decisions

decisionPoints.trigger: Athlete approaching return-to-sport after proximal biceps tendon pathology treatment
decisionPoints.action: Apply sport-specific return-to-play criteria with strength, stability, and functional testing milestones
